arts.ttl: Chelsea had three of the most valuable players in the world in 2006, including winger who scored just 10 goals
arts.sum: John Terry was one of them.

arts.ttl: Joao Felix believes it's only a 'matter of time' until he's starring for Chelsea as he bids to impress on a rare start for the Blues in the Conference League amid fierce competition for places at Stamford Bridge
arts.sum: KIERAN GILL IN ATHENS: Joao Felix feels it's only a 'matter of time' until he is starring for Chelsea, even though he is competing with Cole Palmer for the No 10 position in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca backs "fantastic" summer signing to shine for Chelsea amid Mykhailo Mudryk doubt
arts.sum: Chelsea's fringe players will be given another chance to impress against Panathinaikos in the Europa Conference League with Joao Felix and Mykhailo Mudryk both set to start

arts.ttl: ‘World-class’ Chelsea player really has a point to prove in Conference League vs Panathinaikos - opinion
arts.sum: Chelsea have the chance to rotate their starting squad again when they are back in action tomorrow night in the Conference League. The Blues will...

arts.ttl: Chelsea reporters' teams vs Panathinaikos as Joao Felix replaces Cole Palmer
arts.sum: Bobby's line-up : Jorgensen; Disasi, Tosin, Badiashile, Veiga; Casadei, Dewsbury-Hall; Neto, Felix, Mudryk; Nkunku. Sam's line-up: Jorgensen; Disasi, Tosin, Badiashile, Cucurella; Casadei, Dewsbury-Hall; Madueke, Felix, Mudryk; Nkunku.

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Blues 'eyeing La Liga star' who has excelled after bargain move
arts.sum: Chelsea have allegedly been in touch with Getafe over a potential deal for Christantus Uche during next summer's transfer window.

arts.ttl: Maresca vs Chelsea: Manager critical of 'bad' Acheampong situation
arts.sum: If the way Chelsea treated Conor Gallagher and Trevoh Chalobah in the summer wasn't bad enough, they have now outdone themselves, by essentially telling 18-year-old Josh Acheampong that he will never again play for the club at any level unless he signs a new contract . Enzo Maresca has admitted that it is a'shame' that Josh Acheampong has been frozen out at Chelsea .

arts.ttl: Chelsea get fresh PSR hope as superstar lawyer hired to unlock £518m transfer spend
Chelsea sent brutal Mykhailo Mudryk message after £88m transfer disaster
arts.sum: The Gunners were heavily linked with the frontman and Mudryk wanted the deal, but late in the day Chelsea came in and blew Arsenal out of the water with their offer and Mudryk signed in west London instead. The Ukrainian was a January 2023 arrival at Chelsea, with the Blues splashing out a transfer fee that could rise to £88million for the forward.

arts.ttl: Team News: Panathinaikos vs. Chelsea injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Thursday's Conference League clash between Panathinaikos and Chelsea.
